name: Custardy Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fine stone-ground white or yellow cornmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix milk, cornmeal, and salt in the top part of a double boiler.
2. Place over boiling water and cook, stirring constantly, for 15 minutes or until the mixture is the consistency of thin mush.
3. Remove from heat, add butter, and quickly stir into eggs.
4. Turn batter into a greased 1-quart casserole.
5. Set on trivet in cooker and add 1 inch of hot water.
6. Arrange a sheet of foil loosely over the top of the casserole.
7. Cover and cook on high for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until bread is firm.
8. Serve immediately with butter. Makes 4-6 servings.
